Appearances:
Plaintiff Eugene C. Payne III is present.
Attorney Daniel Borenstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Andrew Linton is present.
Attorney Monti Stegen representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-27-2011 remains on calendar.
